dl.cl.t: Want to modify the core? Clone the repo and work on the develop branch.
dl.e.p: No Python, no setup. Download the executable for your OS from GitHub Releases. Double-click and dashAI opens ready to use.
dl.lead: Two routes: native executable for users who prefer not to install Python, or pip for those who already have an environment. Both leave dashAI ready to use as a desktop application.
dl.p.p: The dashai package starts the server and opens the browser. Requires Python ≥ 3.10.
dl.req.os.s: native executables available for all three
dl.req.ram.s: extra memory recommended for image generation
dl.v.p: Check the official docs or ask directly on Discord: the team and community respond within hours.
